positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a crescent moon and a constellation of glowing, abstract stars, viewed through a circular porthole window. The central design features minimalist geometric constellations (like the Big Dipper or Orion, but abstracted) interconnected by delicate, luminous lines. Floating around the moon are highly stylized cosmic elements: swirling nebulae rendered in deep indigo, teal, and ethereal violet, paired with minimalist, dark silhouette renderings of celestial bodies like distant planets and comets. The overall style is retro-futuristic, highly detailed, and executed with clean, thick linework reminiscent of mid-century astronomical charts mixed with modern vector art. Use strong contrast between the luminous teal/violet glow and the deep black background. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, ideal for an all-over apparel print. Use a limited, rich color palette (indigo, teal, violet, black, and gold glow).
